overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an FBI agent character walking through a misty Pacific Northwest harbor town. The character moves from an open dock area past moored boats, through a covered wooden boardwalk, and approaches a large log cabin building. The scene features wet surfaces, morning mist over mountains, and detailed wooden architecture typical of a rustic waterfront community.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor dock with moored boats

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet harbor dock past moored boats and industrial buildings

entered.detail: white and red motorboat moored at the dock
metal safety railing along the water edge
industrial concrete building with antennas on roof
misty forested mountains in the background
wooden park bench on the dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open harbor dock with wet concrete surfaces reflecting the overcast sky. Moored boats sit in the calm water to the right, while industrial buildings and misty mountains form the backdrop. The area is deserted except for the player character.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden boardwalk along the waterfront

events.description: enters covered wooden pavilion structure from open dock
approaches and passes NPC standing by the railing

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered boardwalk, approaching a man standing by the railing looking out at the water

notable_agents.action: man wearing a hat leaning on the wooden railing, looking out at the lake

entered.detail: wooden roof structure providing shelter over the boardwalk
wooden safety railing along the water side
small wooden structure housing a red life preserver ring
planter box with red flowers attached to the railing
calm lake water with misty mountains reflected on surface

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered wooden boardwalk that runs along the misty lake. The structure features wooden railings, flower boxes, and a life preserver station. An NPC in a hat stands leaning on the railing looking out at the water, which the character passes by as they walk through the sheltered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with large log cabin lodge

events.description: exits covered boardwalk into open town square

agents.ego_description: walking across the wooden plaza toward a large log cabin building, passing a man taking photos

notable_agents.action: man standing in front of the lodge gesturing with his arms raised

entered.detail: large rustic log cabin building with stone foundation and American flags
open wooden deck area in front of the lodge
American flag hanging from the lodge entrance
metal crowd control barrier on the wooden deck

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the character enters an open wooden plaza dominated by a large log cabin lodge with American flags. A man stands in front of the building gesturing with his arms raised. Parked cars are visible to the left as the character approaches the lodge entrance across the wet wooden decking.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, industrial harbor dock into a sheltered boardwalk and finally toward a rustic lodge plaza. It begins with the character walking across wet concrete surfaces that reflect an overcast sky, passing moored boats and misty mountains in the distance. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a covered wooden boardwalk lined with flower boxes and a life preserver station, where they pass a lone figure leaning against the railing. The camera then follows the character as they exit the sheltered walkway and emerge into an open wooden plaza dominated by a large log cabin lodge adorned with American flags. The movement concludes as the character approaches the lodge entrance across the wet decking, passing parked cars and a gesturing man standing before the building.
